text:
Once upon a time, little Fox didn

couldn't wait to wake up. He

peeked through the coffee tree leaves.

They weren't really leaves; they were

dancing spiders!

Wow! Even his nose danced.

Fox leaped out of bed.

Time for a spin! he cried.

He twirled in circles so big

you'd think you flew.

A raccoon caught him.

Ah, Fox!

Don't you worry--

There won't be--

Just this one thing.

What? Your tail?

Oh!

Fox ran around again.

You're quite something.

But—

There's no fox home—

Just a sad cat you'll ever meet...

You.

That?

Just remembering you.

Anyway...

Oh...

That?

Just...

You...








Oh.



Just.

...a tiny chipmunk.

Just.

What? Something wrong with your big eyes?

Oh... nothing...

Just that --

I think I love you.

That's cute.

Good night.

Good night.<|endoftext|>
